title: Luffy Enters the War: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During the fight in Impel down...

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You were almost killed by that poison.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your body is at its limit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you push it any further ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: i have to do all i can...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Marco and Joz are in trouble too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Give me the strength to fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look, if I let you die,
